rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response From Deft To Pltfd'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Dociuments, Set One, And Monetary Sanctions Against Bana And Its Attorney Of Record;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 25, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF MOHSIN AHMMED's Motion To Compel Further Response From Defendant To Plaintiff'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One, And Monetary Sanctions Against Bana And Its Attorney Of Record GRANTED as follows: no later than February 28, 2014 (1) Defendant shall provide further responses to each request at issue; and (2) shall identify responsive documents by their bates numbers to each request at issue. Defendant's untimely opposition is stricken. Defendant failed to participate in meet and confer efforts in good faith: defendant failed to comply with its self-imposed deadline on January 17, 2014 and responded to meet and confer letter one day after the motion deadline has passed. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,060 to be paid no later than February 28, 2014. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 25, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs PAUL KRAAIJVANGER and REAL EQUITY GROUP ONE, LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to request to set aside judgment. No proof of service regarding prove-up hearing as to LLC defendant. Motion to set aside default Paul Kraaijvanger is DENIED, defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b), motion is untimely. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike Deft'S Peremptory Challenge As Untimely
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 25, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFFs CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, EDWARDO GUTIERREZ and FELIZ-ALBERTO VALLE Motion To Strike Defendant'S Peremptory Challenge As Untimely OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with Court's January 31, 2014 order. Motion is untimely per CCP 1005. = (501/JAR)
